metadata.title: Turning a Quick Corner Into a Clean Double Kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Caught these two enemies off guard with fast reactions and precise aim. Sometimes the best plays come from the unexpected angles.
What’s your favorite spot to sneak up on foes?

Let me know your best sneak plays in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps #valorantclips
metadata.cta: Let me know your best sneak plays in the comments!
